name: Alex Chen
resume_text:
Alex Chen | B.Tech Computer Science, NIT Trichy (2024) | CGPA 8.4/10

Skills: Python, Machine Learning, SQL, Git, Data Structures, JavaScript, React, REST APIs

Projects:
- Crop disease detection model using scikit-learn and image features (NLP-style pipeline, 87% accuracy on test set)
- Built a React web app with REST APIs for college fest registration — 500+ active users during event week
- SQL database design for hostel room allotment system (normalized schema, 6 tables, used by 3 hostels)
- Implemented graph algorithms in Python for inter-city route optimization (Dijkstra, BFS, DFS)

Internship: Data Science Intern at Mu Sigma, Bengaluru (Summer 2023)
- Wrote Python scripts for data cleaning, feature engineering, and exploratory analysis on retail client data
- Trained classification models using scikit-learn; documented results in Jupyter notebooks
- Used Git for version control in a team of 5; submitted 15 pull requests over 8 weeks

Courses: Algorithms & Data Structures, Operating Systems, Machine Learning, Database Systems, Computer Networks

Achievements: AIR 2847 in GATE CS 2024 | Finalist, Smart India Hackathon 2023

name: Sam Rivera
resume_text:
Sam Rivera | CFA Level II Candidate | B.Com (Hons), SRCC Delhi | 5 years Financial Analysis → Tech Transition

Skills: Python (intermediate scripting), SQL (queries and joins), Excel (Advanced — pivot tables, VBA macros), Financial Modeling, Data Visualization (Tableau, Excel charts), Stakeholder Management, Project Management

Experience:
- Senior Financial Analyst at Kotak Mahindra Bank, Mumbai (3 years)
  - Built Python scripts to automate monthly MIS report generation — saved 8 hours/week
  - Used SQL to query and join internal banking databases (Oracle DB, 15M+ row tables)
  - Created Excel dashboards for senior management quarterly reviews pulling data from 6 sources
  - Coordinated with 10 cross-functional stakeholders across risk, compliance, and treasury teams
- Junior Financial Analyst at Angel One, Mumbai (2 years)
  - Excel-based financial models for equity research — DCF and comparable company analysis
  - Prepared data-driven insight decks for fund managers presented in weekly review calls

Recent Technical Learning:
- Python for Data Science specialization (Coursera, completed)
- SQL for Data Analysis (Mode Analytics, completed)
- Currently studying: Pandas, NumPy, data pipeline concepts, Git basics

name: Jordan Kim
resume_text:
Jordan Kim | Backend Engineer pivoting to Cloud Security | 3 years experience

Skills: Java, Python, SQL, REST APIs, Git, Docker, Linux, Networking (HTTP/HTTPS/DNS/TCP-IP), CI/CD (Jenkins, GitHub Actions)

Experience:
- Backend Engineer at Razorpay, Bengaluru (3 years)
  - Built and maintained REST APIs in Java/Spring Boot handling 2M+ daily payment transactions
  - Containerized 6 microservices with Docker; reduced deployment time by 35%
  - Managed Jenkins and GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines across 4 engineering teams
  - Linux server administration: log rotation, cron jobs, user/group permissions, systemd services
  - Networking exposure: HTTP/HTTPS, DNS, load balancing (nginx), TLS certificate management for PCI-DSS compliance

Security Projects & Self-Study:
- Home lab: Linux VMs with network segmentation, pfSense firewall, Wireshark packet capture and analysis
- Completed TryHackMe Pre-Security + SOC Level 1 paths (80+ rooms)
- Studying CompTIA Security+ (exam scheduled Q3 2025)
- Applied OWASP Top 10 mitigations in production: fixed SQLi vulnerability and XSS in payment API responses
- Familiar with log analysis: centralized logging with ELK stack in home lab

Motivation: Applying 3 years of fintech infrastructure and backend expertise toward Cloud Security and DevSecOps roles.
